backend/main.mo: Motoko canister defining data models and in‑memory maps for bookings, customers, technicians, batteries, warranties, fleets, user profiles, and route authorization with mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing implemented features, affected frontend files, components used, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file mapping frontend file paths to short descriptive summaries of their purpose and behavior.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base and theme variables defining light and dark mode color tokens using OKLCH values.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML entry file loading root div and the main React script with site metadata and favicon.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app configuring TanStack Router routes including address-confirmation and payment-options with search validation, plus query and theme providers.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with branding, company info, links, contact details, and social icons.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Navigation header handling auth, route changes, and responsive mobile menu with role‑based options.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout wrapper applying global background styles and rendering routed content via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Form for creating a user profile and saving it through a backend mutation with basic validation and toasts.
frontend/src/components/ServiceAreasSect: Section displaying UAE service coverage areas with icons and a service map image.
Showcases a grid of service offerings with icons, titles, and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUsSecti: Highlights key differentiators of the service using a grid of feature cards.
frontend/src/data/buyNowProducts.ts: Defines the BatteryProduct type, a product list, and a helper function to fetch products by ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook creating an authenticated or anonymous backend actor and invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity context, login/logout handling, and AuthClient setup for authentication.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, bookings, technicians, batteries, warranties, and related admin data.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS layers and custom CSS variables for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers and renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AddressConfirmationPa: Page allowing users to confirm address via manual entry or GPS before proceeding to payment.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard for managing bookings, batteries, technicians, warranties, fleets, and related actions.
Displays and filters a sortable battery price list with search and category filters.
frontend/src/pages/BookingPage.tsx: Booking form page enabling service requests, GPS address detection, and compatible battery lookup.
frontend/src/pages/BuyNowPage.tsx: Lists battery products and lets users navigate to address confirmation when clicking Buy Now.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the homepage with hero content, service actions, trust indicators, and lazy‑loaded sections.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Displays a payment failure message with retry and return‑home navigation options.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentOptionsPage.ts: Shows selectable payment methods, validates details, and proceeds to success when valid.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Shows a success confirmation after payment and provides a button to return home.
frontend/src/pages/TechnicianDashboard.t: Provides technicians with job stats, booking lists, and tools to update booking statuses.
frontend/src/utils/checkoutFlow.ts: Serializes and deserializes checkout address data for query‑param based navigation.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility helpers for reading, persisting, and clearing URL and session‑stored parameters.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration enabling dark mode, custom colors, animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing Buy Now flow features, known issues, and existing requirements for navigation, payment options, and copy fixes.
